title: sisymbrium commune
intro: Sisymbrium commune, also known as London rocket, is a biennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Sisymbrium commune include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Sisymbrium commune can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
